title: PB-148 VERIFIED: Runtime Extraction Reduction Matrix
scope: Review-only reduction of 84 NEEDS_RUNTIME_EXTRACTION branches from runtime_branch_consolidation_matrix.json.

estimated_backlog_reduction.method: Count unique capability-family execution units instead of treating every historical branch as a merge candidate.
